title: taraxacum demissum
intro: Taraxacum demissum, also known as lesser dandelion, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family, native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, roots, and flowers, which contain compounds with anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Taraxacum demissum include its potential to support liver and kidney function, as well as its ability to reduce blood pressure and alleviate digestive issues. Taraxacum demissum can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
